use_cases: Display global user distribution for SaaS dashboards
Show network coverage or server locations on interactive maps
Visualize market presence across different regions for businesses
Display real-time location tracking on a 3D world map
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe visualization component with pulsing location markers. Features drag-based rotation controls and customizable markers for displaying geographic data. Built with cobe library for WebGL rendering, suitable for showcasing global presence, network topology, or location-based analytics in modern web applications.
